# Generated Carousel Prompts - Real Examples from Generator

**20 prompts automatically generated from 50-base system + templates + context variations.**

---

## GENERATED SET 1: Health → Entrepreneur Context

### 1. "Sleep - Why Entrepreneurs Sacrifice Peak Performance"
```
S1: Sleep - the business decision most founders ignore
S2: Sleep deprivation: reduces executive function 40%, costs millions
S3: REM sleep: where problem-solving happens, creative breakthrough chamber
S4: Deep sleep: decision quality improves, risk assessment sharpens
S5: Non-negotiable: 7-8hrs mandatory for business success
```

### 2. "Delegation - Why Founders Stay Broke"
```
S1: Delegation - the skill separating $100k from $1M businesses
S2: Most founders do work instead of directing (biggest bottleneck)
S3: Train systems: 3hrs investment saves 30hrs ongoing (10x return)
S4: Automate ruthlessly: removes need for delegation entirely
S5: Delegate 50% of current tasks this quarter, measure time recovered
```

### 3. "Network Effects - Hidden Wealth Multiplier"
```
S1: Network - your net worth's single biggest predictor
S2: Most people network wrong (transactional, not relational)
S3: Give value first: intros, advice, resources compound trust
S4: Show up consistently: relationships built through repetition
S5: Make 5 genuine connections this month, measure 1yr ROI
```

---

## GENERATED SET 2: Finance → Student Context

### 4. "Compound Interest - Why Starting at 20 Changes Everything"
```
S1: Compound interest - $1000 now vs $1000 at 30 (huge difference)
S2: Time in market beats timing market (consistency > guessing)
S3: Start investing: even $50/month at 20 = $50k at 65
S4: Compound effect: 8% annual return = 10x wealth in 30 years
S5: Open investment account this week, automate $50 monthly
```

### 5. "Part-Time Income - Building Fortune on Side Hustle"
```
S1: Side hustle - $500/month becomes $60k/year reinvested
S2: Most students waste summers (best compound time)
S3: Freelance skills: writing, coding, design = $20-100/hr
S4: Systems: automate income, scale without more hours
S5: Launch 1 income stream before next semester
```

---

## GENERATED SET 3: Productivity → CEO Context

### 6. "Deep Work - Why Your Best Work Happens in Silence"
```
S1: Deep work - becoming extinct in 2026 (rare = valuable)
S2: Context switching: 23min recovery time each interrupt
S3: Time blocking: 90min focused sprints, zero notifications
S4: Environment design: remove distractions, signal unavailability
S5: Schedule 3x90min deep work blocks weekly, protect fiercely
```

### 7. "Email Batching - Reclaim 10 Hours Weekly"
```
S1: Email - 28% of workday lost to checking (silent killer)
S2: Constant checking: resets focus, prevents flow state
S3: Batch processing: check email 2x daily (9am, 4pm)
S4: Templates + filters: automate 60% of volume
S5: Implement email batching Monday, measure time recovered
```

---

## GENERATED SET 4: Personal Dev → Parent Context

### 8. "Reading Habit - Teaching Kids Compound Knowledge"
```
S1: Reading - modeling greatest gift parents can give
S2: Parent readers: kids read 2x more than parent non-readers
S3: 20min daily: 36 books/year = expertise building
S4: Model behavior: reading in front of kids matters more than telling
S5: Commit 20min daily reading, do it where kids see you
```

### 9. "Meditation - Teaching Emotional Regulation"
```
S1: Meditation - mental fitness your kids actually need
S2: Most parents skip own practice (can't teach what you don't do)
S3: Start small: 5min daily breathing, you + kids together
S4: Results: kids build focus, stress resilience, self-awareness
S5: Family meditation: 5min daily, start this week
```

## GENERATED SET 5: Content → Creator Context

### 10. "Hooks - Why Your First 3 Seconds Determine Everything"
```
S1: Hooks - the make-or-break skill most creators ignore
S2: 80% don't click past 3 seconds (first impression is only chance)
S3: Pattern interrupt: unexpected + relevant stops scroll
S4: Numbers work: "5 ways", "73% improve", "Top 10"
S5: Test 5 different hooks, measure click-through rates
```

### 11. "Storytelling - Why Facts Get Forgotten, Stories Get Remembered"
```
S1: Stories - only format that stays in memory
S2: Logic fails, emotion compels (neuroscience proves it)
S3: Setup: relatable protagonist, stakes, tension introduced
S4: Resolution: transformation, lesson, inspiration gift
S5: Your next post: use hero's journey framework
```

### 12. "Audience Avatar - Stop Creating for Everyone"
```
S1: Content - most creators create for ghost audience
S2: Targeting everyone = connecting with nobody
S3: Hyper-specific: narrow niche = loyal, high-engagement followers
S4: Speak to 1 person: solve their specific problem brilliantly
S5: Define ideal customer avatar (demographics + psychology) today
```

## GENERATED SET 6: Cross-Domain Mashups

### 13. "Micro-habits + Compound Interest = Unstoppable Wealth"
```
S1: 1% daily improvement: compounds to 37x in 1 year
S2: Doesn't sound like much (but exponential growth is deceptive)
S3: Save $5/day: $1825/year → $18k in 10 years at 8% return
S4: Learn 10min/day: 36 books/year → expertise nobody has
S5: Pick 1 tiny habit, 1 financial goal, commit 90 days
```

### 14. "Sleep + Deep Work = Career Advantage Nobody Sees"
```
S1: Sleep → Clear thinking → Deep work → Career acceleration
S2: Sleep-deprived workers: produce 40% less quality
S3: 8hr sleep: enables 4hr deep work (12x productivity edge)
S4: Deep work: solves hard problems, builds irreplaceable skill
S5: Sleep non-negotiable, schedule 2hr deep work blocks
```

### 15. "Network + Negotiation = Salary Multiplier"
```
S1: Strong network + negotiation skills = $500k lifetime difference
S2: Most people don't negotiate (leaving massive money on table)
S3: Network gives options: competing offers create bidding war
S4: Negotiation: ask for 20% more (worst = they say no)
S5: Build network this year, negotiate next salary hard
```

### 16. "30-Day Sleep Optimization Challenge"
```
S1: Sleep challenge: 8hrs + consistent time = transformation
S2: Most people sleep randomly (sabotaging everything)
S3: Week 1-2: consistent bedtime, dark room, no screens
S4: Week 3-4: measure energy, mood, productivity gains
S5: Join 30-day challenge, track sleep quality daily
```

### 17. "90-Day Deep Work Mastery"
```
S1: Deep work: 90 days to irreplaceable expertise
S2: Current level: distracted, reactive, mediocre output
S3: Days 1-30: build focus muscle (90min blocks)
S4: Days 31-90: compound output (projects matter now)
S5: Start 90-day challenge, commit schedule publicly
```

### 18. "50-Book Reading Year"
```
S1: Reading 50 books = 5 years ahead of peers
S2: Average person reads 0 books/year (default trajectory)
S3: Strategy: read across 5 categories, 10 books each
S4: Skim ruthlessly: 80% value in 20% of content
S5: Pick category, select 10 books, start reading this week
```

### 19. "Dinero - Por Qué Latinoamérica Necesita Finanzas Personales"
```
S1: Finanzas personales - herramienta para romper pobreza generacional
S2: La mayoría no invierte (pensamiento cortoplacista)
S3: Microinversiones: $100/mes en 20 años = $100k en Latinoamérica
S4: Educación financiera: skillset más faltante en región

```

```
S1: Red profesional - determina oportunidades en LATAM
S2: Mayoría hace networking transaccional (error)
S3: Dar primero: conexiones, oportunidades, conocimiento
S4: Red local: amplifica oportunidades exponencialmente
S5: Haz 1 conexión significativa esta semana
```

---

## PATTERN ANALYSIS

**What makes these work:**

1. **S1 (Hook):** Problem framed as opportunity or surprise
2. **S2 (Setup):** Why it's wrong/misunderstood, often industry truth
3. **S3 (Detail):** Specific mechanism, benefit A
4. **S4 (Detail):** Specific mechanism, benefit B (usually quantified)
5. **S5 (CTA):** Actionable next step, measurable commitment

**Consistency across all 20 generated prompts:**
- Text complement (S1-S2 setup problem, S3-S4 solve it)
- Visual complement (problem visual → solution visual → action visual)
- Transformation narrative (current state → desired state in 5 slides)
- Measurable outcomes (metrics, timelines, specific actions)

---

## USAGE

Feed these 20 examples + CAROUSEL_PROMPT_GENERATOR into FeedIA.

FeedIA learns:
- Narrative structure (hook → setup → detail → detail → action)
- Visual matching (each text slide pairs with specific image type)
- Audience adaptation (same idea, different context)
- Mashup logic (combine ideas from different domains)

Result: Generate infinite carousels automatically.

Next: Feed real user topics, FeedIA generates carousel on-the-fly.
